content:
# Pressure Management

**Summary**: The control of reservoir pressure to maintain stability and maximize recovery.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] used regional average pressure as a primary constraint for pressure management.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] Pressure management is critical for preventing formation damage and ensuring long-term stability.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014]] monitored via simulation and real-time gauges.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Maintaining even pressure across regions prevents localized subsidence and damage. ([[2014-al-ismael|AL-ISMAEL, 2014, p. 32]])
